objective: Close the remaining F-0027 mock_exam partition by making submit an exact, all-or-nothing command over the locked exam, answer revisions, deadline owner and durable ai_scoring_task set, while removing non-durable direct/in-memory scoring finalization from the production service contract.
blockedFiles: all provider adapters, credentials, secret/env, deployment and historical evidence/audit files

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: student mock_exam submit/deadline route -> mock-exam service -> MockExamRepository submit command -> student-flow transaction over mock_exam/deadline/answer_record/ai_scoring_task -> durable ai-scoring worker transaction -> direct service, route, repository-source and scoring regressions
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: The practice partition is closed by commit 3bba78a8; this task covers only the remaining mock submit/scoring finalization root cause. Durable ai_scoring_task completion already provides the authoritative post-Provider transaction; the old direct runtime/in-memory queue path is removed rather than expanded.
preRedImpactScan.currentMasterEvidence: submitMockExam transitions the exam before validating exact answer update counts and silently accepts ai_scoring_task insert conflicts; applyMockExamScoringResults updates mock_exam and answer_record outside one transaction, while the production student-flow runtime already configures durable task preparation.
preRedImpactScan.permissionSemantics: unchanged; existing owner and F-0008 authorization checks remain before submit, with no role, entitlement or scope expansion
preRedImpactScan.providerSemantics: strict contraction only; no real Provider call/config change, and every production subjective attempt remains owned by the existing durable ai_scoring_task lifecycle

mockExamAtomicCommandContract.submitBoundary: lock the owned in_progress mock_exam, re-read and validate the complete current answer set, require every expected answer public identity/revision/result update exactly once, complete the deadline owner when applicable, persist the exact durable task set and transition the exam in one transaction
mockExamAtomicCommandContract.concurrency: save and submit serialize on the same mock_exam row; a stale answer revision, duplicate/missing answer, deadline corruption or task identity conflict rolls back the entire submit with a stable conflict
mockExamAtomicCommandContract.durableScoring: subjective scoring is prepared without Provider execution, persisted with submit, and finalized only by the existing leased ai_scoring_task repository transaction that atomically updates task, answer_record and mock_exam
mockExamAtomicCommandContract.legacyBypass: remove the direct synchronous Provider and in-memory queue finalization options from the production mock-exam service contract; no exported path may call applyMockExamScoringResults
mockExamAtomicCommandContract.replay: a terminal submit replay is read-only and cannot reset deadline, answers, scores or enqueue a second task; successful durable scoring results remain immutable
mockExamAtomicCommandContract.rollback: any row-count, identity, revision, task, deadline or terminal CAS mismatch produces zero partial answer, exam, deadline or task writes
mockExamAtomicCommandContract.findingDisposition: F-0027 may close statically only after save/submit/durable scoring/retry regressions and adversarial source checks are GREEN; no runtime database or real Provider proof is claimed

validationCommands.name: mock-exam-submit-scoring-atomic-state-contract
arguments: strictly parses the F-0027 mock partition contract and WIP state

requestedOperations: database application transaction and concurrency logic without schema or real database execution
remove non-durable direct/in-memory scoring finalization from the mock-exam service contract

conditionalCloseoutProjection.trigger: final unchanged candidate passes Minimal Safety Kernel with the fresh database and provider-category tokens required by detected risk, then one commit, ff-only merge, canonical push, sync and cleanup succeed
conditionalCloseoutProjection.projected: F-0027 static product partition closed; F-0013 runtime_hold and absence of runtime database/Provider proof remain explicit
